title: Add unit coverage for gateway status location/time CBOR
description: Follow-up from project-LICHEN-t2hn.6.3. The gateway /status encoder now includes location_provider/time_provider and optional lat_i/lon_i/alt_m/time_unix/satellites fields, including signed CBOR integers, but the encoder remains embedded in gateway main.c and is only build-covered. Extract or otherwise expose enough of the encoder to assert absent and synthetic location/time snapshots without hardware.
acceptance_criteria: A native_sim test verifies gateway status CBOR for absent providers, synthetic negative longitude/altitude, optional fix_time_unix and satellites, correct map size, and no uptime-as-Unix-time behavior.
notes: Closed with existing implementation/test evidence from earlier gateway status encoder extraction. Verified current origin/main on EC2 builder i-05e27e074db786e22 with EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 mounted at /mnt/lichen-zephyr. Command: west twister -T lichen/tests/gateway_status -p native_sim -p qemu_x86 --inline-logs --integration --outdir twister-out-gateway-status-location-close-v1 -x=ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen. Result: PASS, 1 scenario / 2 instances selected, 2/2 configurations passed, 0 failed, 0 errors, 0 skipped, 0 warnings, 10 test cases executed, 42.38s. Acceptance coverage present in lichen/tests/gateway_status: absent providers omit location fields while exposing location_provider/time_provider false; synthetic negative longitude and altitude encode/decode; fix_time_unix and satellites encode/decode; edge signed int values covered; stale snapshot suppresses lat/lon/alt/time_unix/satellites and does not substitute uptime as Unix time. No new source/doc modifications were needed for this Bead; prior implementation reviews were recorded on the commits that added status_cbor and gateway_status tests.
close_reason: Completed by existing gateway status encoder extraction and native_sim/qemu gateway_status tests. Fresh EC2 Twister evidence recorded: 2/2 configs passed, 10 cases, 0 warnings. No new code changes required.
